response.overview: An artist’s memoir navigating the scars of his own past through the lens of Thailand’s fractured political history and surreal contemporary art. The film traces nearly four decades of growth—from a boy with a meaningless name to a young man awakening amidst the smoke and blood of history. It is a profound exploration of grief, intertwining personal loss with the death of an internal patriarch, the cost of freedom, and the lingering aesthetics of the soul.
response.title: ธุลีดาว
